data.description: Asad by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental fragrance for men. Asad was launched in 2021. Top notes are Black Pepper, Tobacco and Pineapple; middle notes are Patchouli, Coffee and Iris; base notes are Vanilla, Amber, Dry Wood, Benzoin and Labdanum.

Yara by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women. Yara was launched in 2020. Top notes are Orchid, Heliotrope and Tangerine; middle notes are Gourmand Accord and Tropical Fruits; base notes are Vanilla, Musk and Sandalwood.

Khamrah by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Spicy fragrance for women and men. Khamrah was launched in 2022. Top notes are Cinnamon, Nutmeg and Bergamot; middle notes are Dates, Praline, Tuberose and Mahonial; base notes are Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Amberwood, Myrrh, Benzoin and Akigalawood.

Bade'e Al Oud Amethyst by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women and men. Bade'e Al Oud Amethyst was launched in 2021. Top notes are Pink Pepper and Bergamot; middle notes are Turkish Rose, Bulgarian Rose and Jasmine; base notes are Agarwood (Oud), Amber and Vanilla.

Fakhar Black by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental fragrance for men. Fakhar Black was launched in 2022. Top notes are Apple, Bergamot and Ginger; middle notes are Lavender, Sage, Juniper Berries and Geranium; base notes are Tonka Bean, Cedar, Amberwood and Vetiver.

Club de Nuit Intense Man by Armaf is a Woody Spicy fragrance for men. Club de Nuit Intense Man was launched in 2015. Top notes are Lemon, Pineapple, Bergamot, Black Currant and Apple; middle notes are Birch, Jasmine and Rose; base notes are Musk, Ambergris, Patchouli and Vanilla.
Tres Nuit by Armaf is a Aromatic Spicy fragrance for men. Top notes are Iris, Lemon and Vervain; middle notes are Lavender, Violet and Spicy Notes; base notes are Ambergris and Sandalwood.

Kismet Angel by Maison Alhambra is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women and men. Kismet Angel was launched in 2020. Top notes are Vanilla, Honeycomb and Amber; middle notes are Cognac, Cinnamon, Caramel and Tonka Bean; base note is Dark Chocolate.

Fakhar Rose by Lattafa Perfumes is a Floral fragrance for women. Fakhar Rose was launched in 2022. Top notes are Fruits, Lily, Pomegranate and Aldehydes; middle notes are Tuberose, Jasmine, Gardenia, Ylang-Ylang, Rose, Honeysuckle and Peony; base notes are Vanilla, White Musk, Sandalwood and Ambroxan.

Asad Zanzibar by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for men. Asad Zanzibar was launched in 2024. The nose behind this fragrance is Fanny Bal. Top notes are Lavender and Black Pepper; middle notes are Coconut Water, Iris and Salt; base notes are Vanilla and Incense.
Yara Moi by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for women. Yara Moi was launched in 2022. Top notes are Jasmine and Peach; middle notes are Caramel and Amber; base notes are Patchouli and Sandalwood.

Yara Tous by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for women. Yara Tous was launched in 2023. Top notes are Mango, Coconut and Passionfruit; middle notes are Jasmine, Orange Blossom and Heliotrope; base notes are Vanilla, Musk and Cashmeran.

Khamrah Qahwa by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women and men. Khamrah Qahwa was launched in 2023. Top notes are Cinnamon, Cardamom and Ginger; middle notes are Praline, Candied Fruits and White Flowers; base notes are Vanilla, Coffee, Tonka Bean, Benzoin and Musk.

Ana Abiyedh Rouge by Lattafa Perfumes is a Woody Spicy fragrance for women and men. Ana Abiyedh Rouge was launched in 2016. Top notes are Nashi Pear, Kumquat and Bergamot; middle notes are Caramel and Geranium; base notes are Ambergris, Musk and Oakmoss.
Raghba by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women and men. The fragrance features Vanilla, Sugar, Agarwood (Oud), Incense, Sandalwood and Musk.

Ramz Lattafa (Gold) by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Apple, Peach, Pear, Black Currant and Sweet Orange; middle notes are Rose, Jasmine Sambac and Orange Blossom; base notes are Sandalwood, White Musk, Vanilla and Patchouli.

Mayar by Lattafa Perfumes is a Floral Fruity fragrance for women. Mayar was launched in 2022. Top notes are Litchi, Raspberry and Violet Leaf; middle notes are White Rose, Peony and Jasmine; base notes are Musk and Vanilla.

Oud Mood by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Rose, Saffron and Pimento; middle notes are Agarwood (Oud), Caramel, Floral Notes and Patchouli; base notes are Woody Notes, Amber, Resins, Incense and Musk.

Velvet Oud by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Woody fragrance for women and men. Velvet Oud was launched in 2018. The fragrance features Leather, Agarwood (Oud), Incense, Amber, Citruses, Musk and Cinnamon.

His Confession by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Woody fragrance for men. This is a new fragrance. His Confession was launched in 2024. Top notes are Lavender, Cinnamon and Mandarin; middle notes are Iris, Benzoin, Cypress and Mahonial; base notes are Vanilla, Tonka, Amber, Incense, Cedarwood and Patchouli.

Maahir by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Floral fragrance for women and men. Maahir was launched in 2019. Top notes are Red Berries, Peach and Bergamot; middle notes are Jasmine, Peony and Red Lily; base notes are Sandalwood, Vanilla Flower and Musk.

Maahir Legacy by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for men. Maahir Legacy was launched in 2023. Top notes are Lime, Mint, Grapefruit, Lavender and Pineapple; middle notes are Black Pepper, Rosemary, juniper berry, Geranium and Frankincense; base notes are Ambroxan, Vetiver, Oakmoss, Tonka Bean and Cashmeran.

Opulent Musk by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental fragrance for women. Opulent Musk was launched in 2019. Top notes are White Musk, Saffron and Lemon; middle notes are White Flowers and Jasmine; base notes are White Musk, Cedar, Amber, Resin and Fir Resin.

Qaed Al Fursan by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Woody fragrance for women and men. Qaed Al Fursan was launched in 2016. Top notes are Pineapple and Saffron; middle notes are Balsam Fir and Jasmine; base notes are Cedar, Amber and Agarwood (Oud).

Qaed Al Fursan Unlimited by Lattafa Perfumes is a Floral Fruity Gourmand fragrance for women and men. Qaed Al Fursan Unlimited was launched in 2022. Top notes are Coconut, Pineapple and Citruses; middle notes are Ylang-Ylang, Frangipani and Jasmine; base notes are Vanilla, Musk, Sandalwood and Sweet Notes.

Najdia by Lattafa Perfumes is a Aromatic Aquatic fragrance for women and men. Najdia was launched in 2020. Top notes are Lemon, Apple, Cinnamon, Lemongrass and Bergamot; middle notes are Watery Notes, Lavender, Cardamom and Rosemary; base notes are Musk, Amber, Sandalwood, Cedar and Tobacco.

Ajwad by Lattafa Perfumes is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Ajwad was launched in 2021. Top note is Fruity Notes; middle notes are Rose and Jasmine; base notes are Vanilla, Musk, Amber and Cedar.

Haya by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for women. Haya was launched in 2022. Top notes are Champagne, Strawberry, Tangerine, Blood Orange and Rose; middle notes are Gardenia, Jasmine and Vanilla Orchid; base notes are Amber, Sandalwood and Chestnut.

Nebras by Lattafa Perfumes is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women and men. Nebras was launched in 2022. Top notes are Red Berries and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Vanilla, Cacao and Rose; base notes are Sugar, Tonka Bean, Amber and Musk.

Teriaq by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for women and men. Teriaq was launched in 2024. The nose behind this fragrance is Quentin Bisch. Top notes are Caramel, Bitter Almond, Apricot and Pink Pepper; middle notes are Honey, Rhubarb, White Flowers and Rose; base notes are Leather, Vanilla, Musk, Labdanum and Vetiver.

Bade'e Al Oud Sublime by Lattafa Perfumes is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Bade'e Al Oud Sublime was launched in 2023. Top notes are Apple, Litchi and Rose; middle notes are Plum and Jasmine; base notes are Moss, Vanilla and Patchouli.

Al Nashama by Lattafa Perfumes is a fragrance for women and men. Al Nashama was launched in 2024. Top notes are Pink Pepper, Sage and Bergamot; middle notes are Plum, Jasmine and Black Pepper; base notes are Saffiano Leather, Amber, Patchouli and Moss.

Eclaire by Lattafa Perfumes is a Floral Fruity Gourmand fragrance for women. Eclaire was launched in 2024. Top notes are Caramel, Milk and Sugar; middle notes are Honey and White Flowers; base notes are Vanilla, Praline and Musk.

Hayaati by Lattafa Perfumes is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Hayaati was launched in 2020. Top notes are Apple and Bergamot; middle notes are Cinnamon and Woodsy Notes; base notes are Musk and Vanilla.

Club de Nuit Sillage by Armaf is a Floral Woody Musk fragrance for women and men. Club de Nuit Sillage was launched in 2020. Top notes are Bergamot, Lemon, Lime, Black Currant, Violet Leaf and Ginger; middle notes are Rose, Jasmine and Iris; base notes are Ambroxan, Musk, Sandalwood and Cedar.

Club de Nuit Untold by Armaf is a fragrance for women and men. Club de Nuit Untold was launched in 2022. Top notes are Saffron and Jasmine; middle notes are Amberwood and Ambergris; base notes are Fir Resin and Cedar.

Club De Nuit Urban Elixir by Armaf is a fragrance for men. Club De Nuit Urban Elixir was launched in 2022. Top notes are Bergamot, Pink Pepper, Orange Blossom and Jasmine; middle notes are Lavender, elemi, Geranium, Vetiver, Saffron and Marigold; base notes are Ambroxan, Amber, Cedar, Patchouli and Labdanum.

Club de Nuit Woman by Armaf is a Floral Fruity fragrance for women. Top notes are Orange, Bergamot, Grapefruit and Peach; middle notes are Rose, Jasmine, Litchi and Geranium; base notes are Patchouli, Musk, Vanilla and Vetiver.

Ventana Pour Homme by Armaf is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. Ventana Pour Homme was launched in 2017. Top notes are Grapefruit, Lemon and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Lavender, Geranium, Vetiver and Patchouli; base notes are Cedar, Amber and Precious Woods.

Derby Club House by Armaf is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. Top notes are Lavender and Bergamot; middle notes are Spicy Notes, Blackwood, Cedar and Patchouli; base notes are Vanilla, Tonka Bean and White Amber.

Hunter by Armaf is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women. Top notes are Green Almond and Jasmine; middle notes are Licorice, Praline and Gardenia; base notes are Sandalwood, Tonka Bean, Patchouli and Musk.

Le Parfait Pour Homme by Armaf is a Oriental fragrance for men. Top notes are Black Currant, Pineapple, Lemon and Bergamot; middle notes are Spicy Notes, Jasmine and Rose; base notes are Ambergris, Musk, Patchouli and Vanilla.

Odyssey Mandarin Sky by Armaf is a fragrance for men. Odyssey Mandarin Sky was launched in 2023. Top notes are Mandarin Orange, Orange, Saffron and Sage; middle notes are Caramel, Tonka Bean and Marigold; base notes are Ambroxan, Cedar and Vetiver.

Odyssey Aoud by Armaf is a Woody Spicy fragrance for men. Odyssey Aoud was launched in 2023. Top notes are Saffron, Nutmeg and Lavender; middle notes are Oud and Woody Notes; base notes are Ambroxan, Musk and Patchouli.

Bucephalus XI by Armaf is a Oriental Spicy fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Black Currant, Pineapple and Bergamot; middle notes are Myrrh, Jasmine and Rose; base notes are Vanilla, Amber, Oakmoss and Musk.

Tag-Him by Armaf is a Woody Spicy fragrance for men. Top notes are Grapefruit, Lemon, Bergamot and Pink Pepper; middle notes are Ginger, Mint, Lavender and Nutmeg; base notes are Vetiver, Sandalwood, Patchouli and Cedar.

Barakkat Rouge 540 Extrait de Parfum by Fragrance World is a Oriental Woody fragrance for women and men. Barakkat Rouge 540 Extrait de Parfum was launched in 2024. Top notes are Bitter Almond and Saffron; middle notes are Cedar and Jasmine; base notes are Woody Notes, Ambergris and Musk.

Barakkat Satin Oud by Fragrance World is a Oriental Woody fragrance for women and men. Barakkat Satin Oud was launched in 2024. Top note is Violet; middle notes are Bulgarian Rose, Turkish Rose and Laotian Oud; base notes are Agarwood, Vanilla, Amber and Benzoin.

Jean Lowe Immortal by Maison Alhambra is a Oriental fragrance for men. Jean Lowe Immortal was launched in 2023. Top notes are Ginger, Grapefruit and Bergamot; middle notes are Rosemary, Water Notes, Sage and Geranium; base notes are Ambroxan, Amber and Labdanum.

Salvo by Maison Alhambra is a Oriental Fougere fragrance for men. Salvo was launched in 2022. Top note is Bergamot; middle notes are Lavender, Sichuan Pepper, Star Anise and Nutmeg; base notes are Ambroxan and Vanilla.
The Tux by Maison Alhambra is a Oriental Floral fragrance for women and men. The Tux was launched in 2022. The fragrance features Patchouli, Spicy Notes, Vanilla, Amber and Floral Notes.

Amber Oud Gold Edition by Al Haramain Perfumes is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women and men. Amber Oud Gold Edition was launched in 2024. Top notes are Bergamot and Green Notes; middle notes are Melon, Pineapple, Amber and Gourmand Accord; base notes are Vanilla, Musk and Woody Notes.

Amber Oud Rouge by Al Haramain Perfumes is a Oriental Floral fragrance for women and men. Amber Oud Rouge was launched in 2019. Top note is Saffron; middle note is Jasmine; base notes are Ambergris, Musk and White Cedar Extract.

Amber Oud Carbon Edition by Al Haramain Perfumes is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Amber Oud Carbon Edition was launched in 2022. Top notes are Bergamot, Lavender and Rosemary; middle notes are Sea Notes, Geranium and Sage; base notes are Moss, Vetiver, Amber and Cedar.

L'Aventure by Al Haramain Perfumes is a Chypre Fruity fragrance for men. L'Aventure was launched in 2016. Top notes are Lemon, Bergamot and elemi; middle notes are Woody Notes, Jasmine and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are Musk, Patchouli and Amber.

L'Aventure Knight by Al Haramain Perfumes is a Oriental Fougere fragrance for men. L'Aventure Knight was launched in 2018. Top notes are Lemon Verbena, Bergamot and Tea; middle notes are Violet Leaf and Iris; base notes are Powdery Notes, Ambergris, Musk and Sandalwood.

Junoon by Al Haramain Perfumes is a Floral fragrance for women. Junoon was launched in 2016. The nose behind this fragrance is Christian Carbonnel. Top notes are Powdery Notes, Rose, Ylang-Ylang and Jasmine; middle notes are Iris, Tonka Bean, Rose and Jasmine; base notes are Heliotrope, Musk and Vanilla.

Hawas for Him by Rasasi is a Aromatic Aquatic fragrance for men. Hawas for Him was launched in 2015. Top notes are Apple, Bergamot, Lemon and Cinnamon; middle notes are Watery Notes, Plum, Orange Blossom and Cardamon; base notes are Ambergris, Musk, Patchouli and Driftwood.

Hawas Ice by Rasasi is a Aromatic fragrance for men. Hawas Ice was launched in 2023. Top notes are Apple, Italian Lemon, Sicilian Bergamot and Star Anise; middle notes are Plum, Orange Blossom and Cardamon; base notes are Musk, Amber, Driftwood and Moss.

Hawas for Her by Rasasi is a Floral fragrance for women. Hawas for Her was launched in 2015. Hawas for Her was created by Claire Liégent and Dominique Ropion. Top notes are Pomegranate, Apple and Grapefruit; middle notes are Iris, Jasmine Sambac and Citruses; base notes are Praline, Patchouli and Vetiver.

Daarej pour Homme by Rasasi is a Oriental Spicy fragrance for men. Top notes are Cumin, Cardamom and Artemisia; middle notes are Rose and Orris Root; base notes are Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Amber, Sandalwood, Patchouli and Musk.

La Yuqawam Homme by Rasasi is a Oriental fragrance for men. La Yuqawam Homme was launched in 2012. Top notes are Raspberry, Saffron and Thyme; middle notes are Olibanum, Jasmine and Artemisia; base notes are Leather, Suede, Woody Notes and Amber.

Shuhrah Pour Homme by Rasasi is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. Top notes are Tomato Leaf, Rose and Freesia; middle notes are Rose, Sandalwood, Cedar and Jasmine; base notes are Leather, Agarwood (Oud), Musk, Oakmoss and Amber.

Royale Blue by Rasasi is a Woody Floral Musk fragrance for men. Top notes are Sea Notes, Bergamot, Melon and Galbanum; middle notes are Lavender, Violet, Jasmine and Rose; base notes are Musk, Sandalwood, Cedar, Amber and Patchouli.

9pm by Afnan is a Oriental Vanilla fragrance for men. 9pm was launched in 2020. Top notes are Apple, Cinnamon, Wild Lavender and Bergamot; middle notes are Orange Blossom and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Amber and Patchouli.

9am by Afnan is a fragrance for women. Top notes are Lemon, Mandarin Orange, Cardamom and Pink Pepper; middle notes are Lavender, Orange Blossom, Green Apple and Rose; base notes are Musk, Moss, Cedar and Patchouli.

9pm pour Femme by Afnan is a Oriental Floral fragrance for women. 9pm pour Femme was launched in 2022. Top notes are Raspberry, Violet, Apple and Orange; middle notes are Rose, Peony, Iris and Jasmine; base notes are Cypress, Pine, Amber and Cedar.

Supremacy Not Only Intense by Afnan is a Oriental Spicy fragrance for men. Supremacy Not Only Intense was launched in 2021. The nose behind this fragrance is Imran Fazlani. Top notes are Black Currant, Bergamot and Apple; middle notes are Oakmoss, Patchouli and Lavender; base notes are Ambergris, Musk and Saffron.

Supremacy Silver by Afnan is a Woody Floral Musk fragrance for men. Supremacy Silver was launched in 2013. The nose behind this fragrance is Imran Fazlani. Top notes are Pineapple, Black Currant, Bergamot and Apple; middle notes are Birch, Patchouli, Moroccan Jasmine and Rose; base notes are Musk, Oakmoss, Ambergris and Vanilla.

Turathi Blue by Afnan is a Aromatic Aquatic fragrance for men. Turathi Blue was launched in 2021. The nose behind this fragrance is Imran Fazlani. Top note is Citruses; middle notes are Woodsy Notes and Amber; base notes are Musk, Spices and Patchouli.

Rare Carbon by Afnan is a Leather fragrance for men. Rare Carbon was launched in 2020. Top notes are Leather, Violet Leaf, Nutmeg and Cinnamon; middle notes are Violet, Agarwood (Oud), Rose and Cedar; base notes are Vetiver, Sandalwood and Amber.
Shaghaf Oud by Swiss Arabian is a Oriental fragrance for women and men. Top note is Saffron; middle notes are Agarwood (Oud) and Rose; base notes are Agarwood (Oud), Praline and Vanilla.

Layali by Swiss Arabian is a Floral Fruity fragrance for women. Top notes are Plum, Black Currant and Orange Blossom; middle notes are Ylang-Ylang, Jasmine and Rose; base notes are Agarwood (Oud) and Amber.
Musk Malaki by Swiss Arabian is a fragrance for women and men. Top note is Lily-of-the-Valley; middle note is White Musk; base notes are Musk and Ambergris.

Casablanca by Swiss Arabian is a Oriental fragrance for women and men. Casablanca was launched in 2016. Top notes are Apple and Grapes; middle notes are White Woods, Iris and Patchouli; base notes are Caramel, Amber, Suede, Musk and Peru Balsam.

Edge by Swiss Arabian is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. Top notes are Lavender, Mint, Geranium and Lemon; middle notes are Orchid, Rose, Cardamom and Cinnamon; base notes are Sandalwood, Cedar and White Musk.
Mukhalat Malaki by Swiss Arabian is a Oriental Woody fragrance for men. The fragrance features Agarwood (Oud), Turkish Rose Oil, Saffron, Woodsy Notes, Amber, Musk and Sandalwood.

Jazzab Gold by Ard Al Zaafaran is a Floral Fruity Gourmand fragrance for women. Top notes are Strawberry, Raspberry, Orange and Lemon; middle notes are Floral Notes, Rose, Spicy Notes and Cedarwood; base notes are Musk, Amber, Vanilla and Oud.

Oud Romancea by Ard Al Zaafaran is a Oriental Woody fragrance for women. Top notes are Mandarin Orange, Black Currant and Bergamot; middle notes are Spicy Notes, Cinnamon, Gardenia, Ylang-Ylang and Jasmine; base notes are Agarwood (Oud), Incense, Sandalwood, Amber and Patchouli.

Liquid Brun by French Avenue is a Woody fragrance for men. Liquid Brun was launched in 2024. Top notes are Cinnamon, Orange Blossom, Cardamom and Bergamot; middle notes are Bourbon Vanilla and elemi; base notes are Praline, Ambroxan, Guaiac Wood and Musk.
